allow: PowerShell($path = "f:\\App for VDO"; if \(Test-Path $path\) { Write-Output "Path exists"; Get-ChildItem -Path $path -Force | ForEach-Object { Write-Output $_.Name } } else { Write-Output "Path does not exist - need to create"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $path -Force | Out-Null; Write-Output "Created directory" })

PowerShell(Get-PSDrive -PSProvider FileSystem | Where-Object { $_.Name -in @\('C','D','E','F','G'\) } | Select-Object Name, @{n='UsedGB';e={[math]::Round\($_.Used/1GB,2\)}}, @{n='FreeGB';e={[math]::Round\($_.Free/1GB,2\)}}, @{n='TotalGB';e={[math]::Round\(\($_.Used+$_.Free\)/1GB,2\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(if \(-not \(Test-Path "D:\\App for VDO"\)\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path "D:\\App for VDO" -Force | Out-Null }; robocopy "F:\\App for VDO" "D:\\App for VDO" /E /XD node_modules /R:1 /W:1 /NFL /NDL /NP /NJH /NJS; Write-Output "---"; Write-Output "Verifying D:\\App for VDO contents:"; Get-ChildItem "D:\\App for VDO" -Force | Format-Table Name, Mode -AutoSize; Write-Output "Tree \(depth 2\):"; Get-ChildItem "D:\\App for VDO" -Recurse -Depth 1 -Force | Select-Object FullName | Format-Table -AutoSize)
PowerShell(Set-Location "D:\\App for VDO"; & "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\npm.cmd" exec --no -- tsc --noEmit 2>&1; Write-Output "EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE")
